immersivehotbar.group.animation_feel.des: Change the animation speeds and overall intensity of the animations.
immersivehotbar.group.animation_triggers: Enable animations for specific item types and events.
immersivehotbar.group.animations.desc: Control whether certain items play animations.
immersivehotbar.group.background_style.d: Style your hotbar background and selection highlight.
Disable bounce effects for specific item types.
Settings to control how smooth or bouncy item animations behave.
immersivehotbar.group.bouncy_animation.d: Customize how bouncy effects behave when items scale.
immersivehotbar.group.durability_glow.de: Glow behavior for low durability items.
immersivehotbar.group.glow_effects.desc: Enable item glow based on durability.
Control the size, tooltip, and text scaling of your hotbar items.
immersivehotbar.group.item_animations.de: Toggles for hotbar slot/item animation behaviors.
immersivehotbar.group.item_scaling.desc: Configure the scaling and behavior of selected and unselected items.
immersivehotbar.group.pop_effect.desc: Tweak how items pop when appearing or scaling.
immersivehotbar.group.selection_behavior: How items respond when selected or changed.
immersivehotbar.group.tooltip.desc: Configure the tooltip animation and its position.
immersivehotbar.group.xp_bar.desc: Settings for smooth XP bar animation.
immersivehotbar.group.xp_glow.desc: Glow at the leading edge of the XP bar when XP increases.
immersivehotbar.group.xp_particles.desc: Particles that spawn at level-up milestones.
immersivehotbar.option.animated_xp_bar.d: Smoothly animates the XP bar instead of updating instantly.
immersivehotbar.option.animation_smoothn:
Controls how smoothly items scale toward their target size.
 Only effective when bounce is disabled.
immersivehotbar.option.bounce_damping.de: How quickly bounce settles. Higher = less bounce.
How strongly items are pulled toward target size. Higher = snappier bounce.
Enables a bouncy effect when hotbar items grow or shrink.
immersivehotbar.option.disable_hotbar_it:
Disables the vanilla item bobbing when picking up items.

Can look funky when you turn it on
immersivehotbar.option.durability_animat:
If enabled, items that take durability damage will animate. 

Tools and Weapons will only animate if their toggles are enabled.
immersivehotbar.option.durability_glow.d: If enabled, items below the set durability threshold will glow red.
immersivehotbar.option.food_animates.des: If enabled, food items animate while eating.
immersivehotbar.option.glow_threshold.de: When to start rendering the durability glow.
immersivehotbar.option.hotbar_item_anima: Master switch for hotbar item animations. Disabling this turns off all animations added by the mod to items on the hotbar, restoring vanilla behavior.
immersivehotbar.option.offhand_animation: Enables the same pop/use animation behavior for the offhand slot.
immersivehotbar.option.pickup_animations: Plays a pop animation when an item appears in a slot, changes, or increases in stack size.
immersivehotbar.option.pop_scale.desc: Default size before items grow. Increase for less intense animations.
immersivehotbar.option.scale_tooltip_off:
Whether the tooltip offset should scale with resolution and GUI size. 

Recommended for consistent placement across fullscreen and windowed modes.

If this option is turned off and the tooltip scale is set too high/low, the tooltip may render off screen and will no longer be visible.
immersivehotbar.option.selected_scale.de: How large the selected hotbar item appears.
immersivehotbar.option.selection_color.d: Sets the highlight color when a hotbar slot is selected.
immersivehotbar.option.selector_scale_en: Smoothly scales the selected-slot selector (the highlight behind the selected hotbar slot).
immersivehotbar.option.should_grow.desc: If enabled, the selected slot will scale larger than the rest.
immersivehotbar.option.show_background.d: Controls when a background is drawn behind each hotbar slot.
immersivehotbar.option.shrink_out_on_emp: When an item leaves a slot (slot becomes empty), the previous item shrinks out smoothly instead of disappearing instantly.
immersivehotbar.option.shrink_speed.desc: Controls how fast the item visually shrinks when removed from the slot.
immersivehotbar.option.text_scaling.desc: If disabled, text, durability bars, and the cooldown overlay will not scale with the item.
immersivehotbar.option.tool_animates.des: If enabled, tools (e.g., pickaxe, axe, shovel) will animate when used.
immersivehotbar.option.tools_ignore_boun: If enabled, tools use smooth animation even when bounce is on.
immersivehotbar.option.tooltip_animation: If enabled, the item tooltip will animate when selecting items.
Adjust the vertical position of the tooltip. 

(Vanilla is 52). 

Only works if 'Toggle Tooltip Y Offset' is enabled.
immersivehotbar.option.tooltip_y_offset_: Disables the Y Offest value if configured. Turn this on if you want to change the offset of the tooltip.
How large unselected hotbar items appear.
immersivehotbar.option.use_animations_en: Plays a small shrink animation when an item is used (durability decreases) or when a consumable stack decreases.
immersivehotbar.option.weapon_animates.d: If enabled, weapons (e.g., sword, bow, crossbow) will animate when used.
immersivehotbar.option.weapons_ignore_bo: If enabled, weapons use smooth animation even when bounce is on.
immersivehotbar.option.xp_bar_speed.desc: Controls how quickly the animated XP bar catches up to the real XP progress.
immersivehotbar.option.xp_glow_boost_on_: How much glow intensity is added each time XP increases (accumulates).
immersivehotbar.option.xp_glow_color.des: Color used for the XP bar glow.
immersivehotbar.option.xp_glow_enabled.d: Adds a glow at the leading edge of the XP bar when XP increases.
immersivehotbar.option.xp_glow_fade_spee: How quickly the XP glow fades out after XP gain.
immersivehotbar.option.xp_glow_tail_px.d: Length of the trailing glow behind the XP bar front edge.
immersivehotbar.option.xp_glow_tail_stri: Number of fade strips used to render the glow tail (higher = smoother).
immersivehotbar.option.xp_text_pulse.des: Controls whether or not the XP level text pulses on level up.
immersivehotbar.title: Immersive Hotbar Config
immersivehotbar.tooltip.advanced_animati: Advanced animation settings for bounce, pop, and smoothing.
immersivehotbar.tooltip.animation: Control how items animate when selected or changed.
immersivehotbar.tooltip.animations: Control what animates and how quickly.
immersivehotbar.tooltip.effects: Glows and particles, including XP effects.
immersivehotbar.tooltip.general: Core hotbar behavior and tooltip settings.
immersivehotbar.tooltip.visuals_behavior: Customize how the hotbar looks and behaves.
